title: How to Use Contact Summary Agent in GoHighLevel — View Insights
description: Learn how to use GoHighLevel's Contact Summary Agent in Ask AI to instantly view contact insights, history, and actionable data. Complete guide with best practices.
html_content:
Managing contacts across multiple conversations, payments, tasks, and appointments can quickly become overwhelming—especially when you're running an agency and juggling dozens of clients simultaneously. You need answers fast: Who is this contact? What's their history with us? Are they a high-priority lead or an existing client?

That's where GoHighLevel's Contact Summary Agent comes in. This AI-powered feature, built into the Ask AI tool, lets you ask conversational questions about any contact and instantly get a comprehensive profile that pulls data from across your entire CRM. No more digging through notes, scrolling through conversation threads, or hunting for payment records. Just ask, and AI delivers.

In this guide, I'll walk you through exactly how to use the Contact Summary Agent to streamline your workflow, save hours each week, and make smarter decisions about your prospects and clients. And if you're ready to experience the full power of GoHighLevel's AI features yourself, start your free 30-day trial here—that's double the standard trial length.

📋 In This Guide

  • What Is the Contact Summary Agent?
  • How to Access the Contact Summary Agent in GoHighLevel
  • Using Conversational Prompts to Ask Questions About Contacts
  • Real-World Use Cases for Contact Summary Agent
  • Best Practices for Leveraging AI Insights in Your Agency Workflow

What Is the Contact Summary Agent?

The Contact Summary Agent is GoHighLevel's newest AI-powered feature, integrated directly into the Ask AI panel within HighLevel Copilot. Think of it as your personal research assistant that knows everything about every contact in your system.

Instead of manually reviewing conversations, payment history, task lists, appointment records, and notes scattered across your CRM, you simply type a natural language prompt—like "Summarize this contact" or "What's their purchase history?"—and the AI instantly assembles a comprehensive profile.

What makes this powerful is consolidation. Your contact data lives in multiple places:

  • Conversation history and email threads
  • Payment and transaction records
  • Tasks and follow-ups assigned to them
  • Notes from your team
  • Appointment calendars and attendance
  • Custom fields and contact properties

The Contact Summary Agent pulls all of this together and presents it in a way that's actually useful—no clicking between tabs, no searching, no guesswork.

How to Access the Contact Summary Agent in GoHighLevel

Getting started with the Contact Summary Agent is straightforward. Here's the step-by-step process:

Step 1: Navigate to Your Contact Record

Open GoHighLevel and go to your CRM. Select any contact you want to learn more about by clicking on their profile.

Step 2: Open the Ask AI Panel

Once you're on the contact record, look for the Ask AI button or icon—typically located in the right sidebar or near the top of the contact details section. Click it to open the Ask AI panel.

Step 3: Confirm You're Using the Contact Summary Agent

The Ask AI panel may show different AI agents available to you. Make sure you've selected the Contact Summary Agent. This agent is specifically designed to analyze the contact you've selected and pull their full profile.

Step 4: Type Your Prompt

This is where conversational prompts shine. You don't need technical language or specific keywords. Just ask what you want to know about the contact in plain English.

💡 Pro Tip

The Contact Summary Agent works best when you've already selected a contact. If you try to use it without selecting a specific contact first, it won't have the data context it needs to provide accurate summaries.

Using Conversational Prompts to Ask Questions About Contacts

The real magic of the Contact Summary Agent is in how natural and flexible it is. You're not filling out forms or writing code—you're having a conversation with AI.

Simple Summary Prompts

Start basic if you're new to this:

  • "Summarize this contact"
  • "Give me an overview of this contact"
  • "What do we know about this contact?"

Specific History Queries

Once you see what's possible, ask more targeted questions:

  • "What's their purchase history?"
  • "How many times have we spoken with this contact?"
  • "What was the outcome of their last appointment?"
  • "Are there any open tasks or follow-ups for this contact?"

Analysis and Insight Prompts

Push deeper for actionable intelligence:

  • "Is this a high-value client based on their engagement?"
  • "What should our next step be with this contact?"
  • "Summarize their main pain points based on our conversations"
  • "What products or services would be a good fit for this contact?"

The AI interprets context and intent, so you can phrase questions however feels natural. This conversational approach is much faster than traditional contact research.

Real-World Use Cases for Contact Summary Agent

Scenario 1: Quick Client Refresh Before a Call

You have a call scheduled in 15 minutes with a client you haven't touched base with in three months. Instead of scrambling through emails and notes, open their contact and ask: "Give me a quick summary of this client and any recent activity." You're prepped before the call starts.

Scenario 2: Team Handoff

You're passing a contact to another team member who's never worked with them before. Rather than trying to remember all the details, ask the Contact Summary Agent: "What should the new team member know about this contact?" The AI delivers a complete briefing in seconds.

Scenario 3: Lead Qualification

Your sales team gets a callback from someone who claims they've contacted you before. Is this contact worth pursuing? Ask: "Is this contact a qualified lead based on their history and engagement?" Get an instant assessment.

Scenario 4: Upsell or Cross-Sell Identification

You're looking to grow account value. Ask: "Based on their history and current services, what's the next logical product we should offer them?" The AI synthesizes their entire relationship to suggest relevant offerings.

Best Practices for Leveraging AI Insights in Your Agency Workflow

1. Use It Before Every Important Interaction

Sales calls, support escalations, renewal meetings—if it matters, get a summary first. It takes 30 seconds and makes you look infinitely more prepared.

2. Combine AI Insights with Your Own Judgment

The Contact Summary Agent is powerful, but it's a tool, not a replacement for human decision-making. Use it to inform your strategy, not dictate it. If the AI suggests a next step that doesn't align with your business logic, trust your expertise.

3. Keep Your Contact Data Clean

The quality of AI insights depends entirely on the quality of your data. Encourage your team to:

  • Add detailed notes after every interaction
  • Update contact properties consistently
  • Log tasks and outcomes accurately

4. Train Your Team on Prompting

The more specific your questions, the more useful the answers. Spend an hour showing your team how to ask better questions—it pays dividends over time.

💡 Pro Tip

Combine the Contact Summary Agent with GoHighLevel's automation features. Use AI insights to trigger workflows—for example, if a contact shows high engagement, automatically escalate them to a premium support tier or suggest an upsell campaign.

5. Review Summaries for Missing Information

If the Contact Summary Agent returns incomplete insights, it's a signal that your team needs to log more information. Use this as a quality-control mechanism for your CRM data.

6. Document Use Cases Across Your Team

As different team members find success with the Contact Summary Agent, encourage them to share their prompts and processes. What works for your sales team might inspire your support or account management teams.
